blockers.title: Clients can submit a complete brief through a secure review-only invitation

definitionOfDone.item: Invitation schema and service-role-only RPC grants are applied and catalog-verified in production
Tokens are random, stored only as hashes, expire, are revocable, and have bounded analysis attempts
Client intake captures the operational brief and creates a pending submission without activating automation
An authenticated operator can review, reject, or create a review-only client from a submission
A production invitation loads, analyzes a real website, submits once, and appears in the operator review queue

evidence.description: Focused tests cover random URL-safe token hashing, complete-brief validation, tracking-parameter normalization, cross-business isolation, and missing-evidence behavior.
TypeScript strict checking passes for public token routes, service-role RPC boundaries, invitation controls, and operator review actions.

Production migration completed successfully. Catalog verification found RLS on both invitation tables, zero anon/authenticated table or function grants, 14 service-role table grants, two service-role RPC grants, and all six client operating fields.

Production onboarding E2E created invitation 49b7185c-28a5-45c9-81cd-365d45bd45b3, loaded https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app/onboard/Vr7DT0nJ3U6CiFSwmtP7Cr4aCYclX6NZyVnaTRgX_Hk, analyzed https://unchainedcoffee.com/, submitted once through submit_onboarding_invitation, and verified pending submission d12afdf6-73a7-448a-8913-633b61bfacd7 in the operator review queue.

rollback.strategy: revoke outstanding invitations, remove public onboarding routes, then drop invitation functions and tables while retaining operator-created clients

blockers.title: Onboarding findings are isolated and evidence-backed per business

definitionOfDone.item: Website analysis uses current-request metadata and structured data without shared demo values
Missing category, services, tone, and location evidence is reported as not found
Analyzer is admin-authenticated, validates input, blocks private-network targets, and saves confirmed client data
Production onboarding produces distinct findings for two different business websites

evidence.description: Focused Node tests prove dental and coffee HTML produce distinct categories, services, tone, and locations; evidence-poor HTML returns empty findings with warnings.
TypeScript strict checking and diff validation pass for the protected API route, onboarding UI, and transactional client/brand-voice save flow.

Production LaunchOps onboarding E2E created two invitation-backed analyses at https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app: Unchained Coffee returned category Coffee Shop, services coffee and espresso, and tone community-focused; Aspen Dental returned category Dentist, services whitening and implants, and tones community-focused, premium, professional, and warm. The run submitted one pending operator-review row 097b43bd-ee4d-438b-91a6-87217bf27f2b.

rollback.strategy: remove the dashboard onboarding route and analyzer API while retaining the existing manual client editor

blockers.title: Agent actions are permissioned, evidenced, and RLS-isolated

definitionOfDone.item: AAL migration applies cleanly and seeds the default agent/tool permissions
Runtime denies unknown, suspended, explicit-deny, and under-scoped tool calls before execution
Operator tables have RLS enabled with anon/authenticated privileges revoked
Successful production execution records terminal state, typed evidence, and audit
Security advisors and production deployment evidence are recorded

evidence.description: Production migration transaction succeeded; Supabase migration history now records 20260717011053 content_approvals and 20260717053823 agent_authority_foundation.
Catalog verification returned one active default agent, five execute grants, RLS on all 10 operator tables, zero anon/authenticated operator grants, and preserved anon insert-only access to leads.
Unit tests cover active permission ranking plus unknown, suspended, explicit-deny, and under-scoped fail-closed decisions; npm test and npm run typecheck pass.

Supabase Advisor real findings for public/authenticated execution of public.rls_auto_enable() were remediated. Remaining security notices are intentional: anon insert-only leads and RLS tables with no browser policies or grants.
Vercel production deployment for commit 8151a5f reached Ready and completed the production Next.js build that local sandbox DNS could not perform.

Production run dc090f5b-0ba7-4c05-aa75-69facf315ae1 completed as succeeded under agent default with start/completion timestamps, no error, one output evidence row, one successful audit, and one pending content approval.

rollback.strategy: revert runtime authority wiring, remove AAL tables/columns after exporting evidence, and restore the prior service-role-only tool_runs path

blockers.title: Generated content requires an operator decision

definitionOfDone.item: content_approvals migration applied and verified in production
Genuine social generation creates one pending approval and opens Draft Preview
Current brand-policy violations prevent approval
Operator approve/reject decision persists with notes and timestamp
Production deployment and end-to-end evidence recorded

evidence.description: Unit tests and server-side checks reject current banned phrases before approval, including hashtag-normalized variants.
Supabase SQL verification confirmed public.content_approvals exists with RLS enabled, expected columns and queue index, service_role CRUD grants, and no anon or authenticated SELECT grants.

Production run c2ccbba1-e476-4632-8483-e704d441bef5 generated exactly three Onion Google Business drafts, opened Draft Preview as pending, included no hashtags and image directions, and passed the current banned-phrase check.
Production approval persisted as approved with an operator note and decided_at timestamp; the decision form was removed and the draft remained available as an immutable run preview.
Vercel production deployment for commit 641d081 reached Ready at https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app before the genuine execution and approval checks.

rollback.strategy: disable approval writes and drop public.content_approvals before any publishing integration depends on it

definitionOfDone.item: getforge.ai owned and added to Vercel project forge-agent
GitHub repo exists at https://github.com/Rahulsanecdote/Forge
Next.js 14 scaffold pushed to main

evidence.description: GitHub API reports Rahulsanecdote/Forge exists with default branch main and pushed commit 3c01a1e.
Vercel project forge-agent linked locally as project prj_bBDfqQepC8A0t6Kf8KC65kl39l4g.
Vercel domains add getforge.ai succeeded, and domains inspect reports getforge.ai found under rahuls-projects-5433a772 with Edge Network enabled.

definitionOfDone.item: 0001_init.sql, 0002_reviews.sql, and 0003_phase00_foundation.sql applied to remote
leads + profiles tables verified present
RLS policies confirmed (anon insert; server-side service-role reads)
auto-profile trigger fires on signup

evidence.description: supabase db push applied 0001_init.sql, 0002_reviews.sql, and 0003_phase00_foundation.sql to project ygygmbocmxhbnvpemsic.
supabase migration list reports Local and Remote versions aligned for 0001, 0002, and 0003.
supabase db lint --linked completed with no schema errors found.

rollback.command: supabase migration repair / drop tables leads, profiles

definitionOfDone.item: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + ANON_KEY set in Vercel
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY set (server-only)
App fails closed if required secrets missing in prod
No secret present in any NEXT_PUBLIC_ variable

evidence.description: Vercel production env lists NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, FORGE_ADMIN_PASSWORD, FORGE_PROVIDER, FORGE_BASE_URL, FORGE_MODEL, FORGE_API_KEY, and NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.
npm run env:validate completed successfully locally, and latest GitHub CI run 29129632295 completed successfully with production env-contract validation.

blockers.title: Coming Soon page deployed + email capture working

definitionOfDone.item: Coming Soon page deployed to Vercel
Supabase keys wired into capture form
Test email lands in leads table
Production Vercel URL is active; getforge.ai SSL is deferred

evidence.description: Vercel production deployment dpl_3Ew7oUNYvjNUF6KWJtDzThoWaHPG is Ready and aliased to https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app.
curl -I https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app returned HTTP/2 200 with Vercel TLS headers.
Production POST /api/leads returned 201 for launchops-prod+1783736973379@getforge.ai, and Supabase readback found the row in leads with source launchops-production-e2e.
Operator decision on 2026-07-20: use https://forge-agent-ten.vercel.app as the active production preview URL and defer getforge.ai DNS/SSL until the domain is available.

blockers.title: CI verification gates passing on main

definitionOfDone.item: CI installs the committed lockfile with npm ci and runs the full test suite
Current main passes typecheck and production build
secret scan (gitleaks) clean
Environment and LaunchOps board validation pass

evidence.description: GitHub Actions CI run 29129632295 on main completed successfully for commit 3c01a1e.
Local npm run typecheck and npm run build completed successfully on 2026-07-11.
Governance-hardening branch passed 115 Node tests, TypeScript strict checking, environment validation, LaunchOps validation, and a full Next.js 15 production build covering 27 route entries.

blockers.title: Generated content and structured model output fail closed

definitionOfDone.item: Every draft copy or export action requires an approved record and a clean current policy check
Review replies are associated by stable review ID instead of model array position
Review, keyword, report, and competitor model outputs use strict runtime schemas
Focused tests prove pending, rejected, malformed, duplicate, reordered, and mismatched outputs fail closed
Full local test, typecheck, build, environment, and LaunchOps evidence is recorded
Production deployment and governed-content smoke-test evidence is recorded

evidence.description: Focused Node tests cover approval-required export, current-policy violations, stable review ID mapping, duplicate review IDs, empty keyword clusters, report period mismatch, and competitor set mismatch.

Full local verification passed: 115 tests, TypeScript strict checking, environment contract validation, LaunchOps validation, and a Next.js production build with all 27 route entries generated or compiled successfully.

rollback.strategy: revert the export policy helper, stable review mapping, strict output schemas, and associated CI/LaunchOps changes as one phase
